overview:
## Discussion

You use this tag to set or get a value of type `SecProtocolType` that represents the Internet protocol. For possible protocol type values, see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecProtocolType]. This is unique to AppleShare and Internet password attributes.

# SecItemAttr.protocolItemAttr

**Case**

Identifies the protocol attribute.

## Declaration

```swift
case protocolItemAttr
```

## Discussion

You use this tag to set or get a value of type `SecProtocolType` that represents the Internet protocol. For possible protocol type values, see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecProtocolType]. This is unique to AppleShare and Internet password attributes.
title: SecItemAttr.protocolItemAttr
